charge_type.charge_name: Conspiracy to traffic in a dangerous drug
charge_type.source: Offence:   Conspiracy to traffic in a dangerous drug (串謀販運危險藥物)

drugs.source: Upon search, the police found a paper wrapping containing two plastic bags containing a total of 42 grammes of a solid containing 31.4 grammes of cocaine narcotic. This is Exhibit E1.

mitigating_factors.source: In respect of the 1st defendant’s assistance or the information offered by him in the video-recorded interviews that led to the arrest of one further person for drug trafficking activities, ... I am agreeable to give him a slight further discount for the information provided to the police. So he would be entitled to 36 per cent discount in total including his assistance and also his plea of guilty.
He had taken different courses to better equip himself whilst remanded in custody.

guilty_plea.source:
They pleaded guilty to the offence on 3 February this year before a magistrate and were committed to the High Court for sentence.
... So he would be entitled to 36 per cent discount in total including his assistance and also his plea of guilty.

starting_point.source: So for 31.4 grammes of cocaine narcotics, on a mathematical calculation, the starting point would be one of 6 years and 7 months’ imprisonment.

sentence_after_role.source: Inferred as starting point since role adjustment not provided

notional_sentence.source: I consider that the appropriate starting point should be 6 years and 7 months’ imprisonment.

final_sentence.source: In any event, having considered all the circumstances, I am agreeable to give him a slight further discount for the information provided to the police. So he would be entitled to 36 per cent discount in total including his assistance and also his plea of guilty. The resulting sentence for the 1st defendant is 4 years and 2 months’ imprisonment.

charge_type.charge_name: Conspiracy to traffic in a dangerous drug
charge_type.source: Offence:   Conspiracy to traffic in a dangerous drug (串謀販運危險藥物)

drugs.source: Upon search, the police found a paper wrapping containing two plastic bags containing a total of 42 grammes of a solid containing 31.4 grammes of cocaine narcotic. This is Exhibit E1.

aggravating_factors.source:
He also hired the room for a period of 2 years, apparently on behalf of the drug trafficking syndicate. ... Apparently, his role was slightly more culpable than that of the 1st defendant.
Having considered all the circumstances of the conspiracy, I consider the appropriate starting point for the 2nd defendant will be 6 years and 8 months’ imprisonment.

mitigating_factors.source: Counsel also informed me the 2nd defendant had provided a written statement to the police in his attempt to assist the authorities, but it did not result in anything fruitful and it was considered to be not of practical use to the prosecution.

Counsel urged this court to exercise its discretion to give him further discount because of his psychiatric conditions. ... While that do not in fact amount to any real mitigation, I would take that into account as a matter of leniency and grant him a further discount of 1 month. So the sentence in respect of the 2nd defendant is 4 years and 4 months’ imprisonment.

guilty_plea.source:
They pleaded guilty to the offence on 3 February this year before a magistrate and were committed to the High Court for sentence.
... As such, he is entitled to the full one-third discount which reduce the sentence to 4 years and 5 months’ imprisonment.

starting_point.source: So for 31.4 grammes of cocaine narcotics, on a mathematical calculation, the starting point would be one of 6 years and 7 months’ imprisonment.

sentence_after_role.source: Having considered all the circumstances of the conspiracy, I consider the appropriate starting point for the 2nd defendant will be 6 years and 8 months’ imprisonment.

notional_sentence.source: Having considered all the circumstances of the conspiracy, I consider the appropriate starting point for the 2nd defendant will be 6 years and 8 months’ imprisonment.

mitigation_reduction.source: While that do not in fact amount to any real mitigation, I would take that into account as a matter of leniency and grant him a further discount of 1 month. So the sentence in respect of the 2nd defendant is 4 years and 4 months’ imprisonment.

final_sentence.source:
So the sentence in respect of the 2nd defendant is 4 years and 4 months’ imprisonment.
This is the ultimate sentence for the 1st defendant, 4 years 2 months, and for the 2nd defendant, 4 years 4 months.
